---
listing:
  contents: .
  template: pubs.ejs
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: false
  sort-ui: [date, title, author]
  filter-ui: [date, title, author, details]
  date-format: "YYYY"
  page-size: 50
sidebar: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

# Publications

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}

<ul class="fa-ul">
  <li><a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Ui4ulbcAAAAJ"><i class="fa-li ai ai-google-scholar" style="padding-top:4px;"></i>Google Scholar</a></li>
  <li><a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Monica-Reggiani"><i class="fa-li ai ai-researchgate" style="padding-top:4px;"></i>Research Gate</a></li>
</ul>

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

<ul class="fa-ul">
  <li><a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-5029-1892"><i class="fa-li ai ai-orcid" style="padding-top:4px;"></i>ORCID</a></li>
  <li><a href="https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=56246028800"><i class="fa-li ai ai-scopus" style="padding-top:4px;"></i>Scopus</a></li>
</ul>

:::


::::

## Journals

This site is under heavy reconstruction, migrating to [Quarto](http://quarto.org). Please refer to the previous links for the whole list of publications
